description_long: This is a large, two-story suburban house with a complex, multi-sectioned layout, surrounded by a fenced yard and mature trees. The main structure features a combination of octagonal and rectangular volumes, with a prominent covered front porch supported by columns. The roof is predominantly hip-style with multiple intersecting sections, and the exterior is finished in muted green with white trim. There is a detached garage and a spacious driveway leading to the main entrance, as well as a secondary building at the rear of the property. The landscaping includes several trees and shrubs, and the property is enclosed by a low fence, giving it a private, residential feel.
description: A large, two-story suburban house with a hip roof, covered porch, detached garage, and fenced yard, surrounded by trees and landscaping.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance with a covered porch, columns, and the driveway leading up to the house, with the detached garage visible to the right.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, detached garage, and the rear building, with the main house's multi-sectioned roof and yard layout visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, secondary building, and the fenced perimeter, with the back facade of the house and landscaping clearly visible.
description_view_3: Side/rear angle showing the main house, the connection to the garage, and the open driveway area, with trees and fencing along the property edge.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with bay and standard windows
attribute_entryway_design: Covered front porch with columns, steps, and a central door, accented by overhangs and decorative trim.
